title: For Somalia, Building Climate Resilience Is Key to Unlocking Long-Term Growth and Jobs
summary: A new World Bank report argues that climate resilience investments could materially improve Somalia’s jobs outlook and reduce projected economic losses.

title: US extends ban on commercial flights to Haiti's capital due to gang violence
summary: AP reported that the FAA extended restrictions on flights to Port-au-Prince because of persistent security threats and gang violence.

title: WHO Yemen: WHO strengthens trauma and nutrition care in Yemen’s high-risk districts with support from ECHO
summary: WHO scaled trauma and nutrition services in high-risk districts as conflict and air strikes continued to strain Yemen’s health system.

title: Multi-Agency Durable Solutions Initiative Launched for Sudan’s Displaced Communities
summary: UN agencies and partners launched a new initiative aimed at linking urgent support with longer-term recovery for displaced communities in Sudan.

title: IMF Executive Board Approves 48-month US$20 billion Extended Arrangement for Argentina
summary: The IMF approved a new Extended Fund Facility for Argentina, setting out macroeconomic policy priorities and disbursement terms.

title: World Bank Announces New Strategy for Haiti
summary: The World Bank endorsed a new 2025-2029 strategic partnership for Haiti focused on resilience, governance, and employment.

title: Updated Ukraine Recovery and Reconstruction Needs Assessment Released
summary: The World Bank, the European Commission, the United Nations, and the Government of Ukraine updated the country’s recovery and reconstruction needs estimate.

title: As the crisis in Yemen deepens, aid agencies appeal for $2.5 billion for the humanitarian response in 2025
summary: The United Nations launched the 2025 Yemen Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan amid continued economic decline and food insecurity.
